---
title: "Filip Popovic"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<!-- NAVBAR -->
<nav class="fp-nav">
  <div class="fp-nav-inner">
    <a href="index.html" class="fp-nav-logo">Filip <span>Popovic</span></a>
    <ul class="fp-nav-links">
      <li><a href="index.html" class="active">Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="projects.html">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="contact.html">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
    <button class="fp-theme-btn" data-theme-toggle aria-label="Toggle dark mode">
      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="fp-hero">
  <div class="fp-hero-inner">
    <div>
      <p class="fp-hero-label">Data Analyst · Vienna, Austria</p>
      <h1>Turning data<br>into <em>decisions</em></h1>
      <p class="fp-hero-desc">
        I'm Filip — a Statistics & Data Science student at the University of Vienna
        with a focus on statistical modelling, time series analysis, and electoral data.
        I help clients extract clear answers from complex datasets.
      </p>
      <div class="fp-hero-actions">
        <a href="projects.html" class="btn btn-primary">
          View my work
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="contact.html" class="btn btn-outline">Get in touch</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fp-hero-avatar" aria-hidden="true">FP</div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS STRIP -->
<div class="fp-skills-strip">
  <div class="fp-skills-inner">
    <span class="fp-skills-label">Tools & Skills</span>
    <span class="fp-skill-chip accent">R</span>
    <span class="fp-skill-chip accent">Python</span>
    <span class="fp-skill-chip accent">SQL</span>
    <span class="fp-skill-chip">Time Series</span>
    <span class="fp-skill-chip">Statistical Modelling</span>
    <span class="fp-skill-chip">Data Visualisation</span>
    <span class="fp-skill-chip">RMarkdown</span>
    <span class="fp-skill-chip">Monte Carlo</span>
    <span class="fp-skill-chip">Regression Analysis</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURED PROJECTS -->
<section class="fp-section">
  <div class="fp-container">
    <div class="fp-section-header">
      <p class="fp-eyebrow">Selected Work</p>
      <h2>Recent projects</h2>
      <p>End-to-end analyses from raw data to actionable insights — across economics, finance, and political science.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="fp-projects-grid">
      <!-- Project 1 -->
      <div class="fp-project-card">
        <span class="fp-project-tag">Time Series · Economics</span>
        <h3>Croatian GDP Analysis</h3>
        <p>Modelled long-run GDP trends for Croatia using polynomial regression and ARFIMA processes. Decomposed seasonal components and produced forecasts with confidence intervals.</p>
        <div class="fp-project-methods">
          <span class="fp-method-tag">ARFIMA</span>
          <span class="fp-method-tag">Polynomial Regression</span>
          <span class="fp-method-tag">Trend Decomposition</span>
          <span class="fp-method-tag">R</span>
        </div>
        <a href="projects.html" class="fp-project-link">
          View project
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
        </a>
      </div>
      <!-- Project 2 -->
      <div class="fp-project-card">
        <span class="fp-project-tag">Time Series · Finance</span>
        <h3>Gold Return Forecasting</h3>
        <p>Analysed gold price return series using spectral analysis and ARFIMA modelling. Applied white noise tests and assessed long-memory properties to evaluate market predictability.</p>
        <div class="fp-project-methods">
          <span class="fp-method-tag">Spectral Analysis</span>
          <span class="fp-method-tag">White Noise Tests</span>
          <span class="fp-method-tag">ARFIMA</span>
          <span class="fp-method-tag">R</span>
        </div>
        <a href="projects.html" class="fp-project-link">
          View project
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
        </a>
      </div>
      <!-- Project 3 -->
      <div class="fp-project-card">
        <span class="fp-project-tag">Data Pipeline · Political Science</span>
        <h3>Austrian Elections Analysis</h3>
        <p>Built a full data pipeline to validate, clean and analyse Austrian electoral results (2019–2024). Implemented D'Hondt seat allocation, coalition modelling and Monte Carlo simulations.</p>
        <div class="fp-project-methods">
          <span class="fp-method-tag">D'Hondt Algorithm</span>
          <span class="fp-method-tag">Monte Carlo</span>
          <span class="fp-method-tag">Data Validation</span>
          <span class="fp-method-tag">R</span>
        </div>
        <a href="projects.html" class="fp-project-link">
          View project
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:center; margin-top: var(--space-10);">
      <a href="projects.html" class="btn btn-outline">See all projects</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATS -->
<section class="fp-section fp-section-alt">
  <div class="fp-container">
    <div class="fp-stats">
      <div class="fp-stat">
        <div class="fp-stat-number">3+</div>
        <div class="fp-stat-label">Completed Projects</div>
      </div>
      <div class="fp-stat">
        <div class="fp-stat-number">6</div>
        <div class="fp-stat-label">Semesters of Statistics</div>
      </div>
      <div class="fp-stat">
        <div class="fp-stat-number">R · Python · SQL</div>
        <div class="fp-stat-label">Primary Tools</div>
      </div>
      <div class="fp-stat">
        <div class="fp-stat-number">∞</div>
        <div class="fp-stat-label">Curiosity for Data</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT TEASER -->
<section class="fp-section">
  <div class="fp-container">
    <div class="fp-contact-box">
      <h2>Let's work together</h2>
      <p>Looking for a data analyst for your next project? I'm available for freelance work.</p>
      <div class="fp-contact-links">
        <a href="contact.html" class="btn btn-primary">Get in touch</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/filip-popovic" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="btn btn-outline">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer class="fp-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Filip Popovic · Vienna, Austria</p>
</footer>

<script>
(function(){
  const t = document.querySelector('[data-theme-toggle]');
  const r = document.documentElement;
  let d = matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme:dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light';
  r.setAttribute('data-theme', d);
  if(t) t.addEventListener('click', () => {
    d = d === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
    r.setAttribute('data-theme', d);
  });
})();
</script>
```
